error: this trait cannot be derived for unions
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-10T00-24-35/gemma-3-12b/declarations/structure_and_union_spec_1/sample_001/target.rs:7:10
  |
7 | #[derive(Debug)]
  |          ^^^^^

warning: type `v` should have an upper camel case name
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-10T00-24-35/gemma-3-12b/declarations/structure_and_union_spec_1/sample_001/target.rs:2:8
  |
2 | struct v {
  |        ^ help: convert the identifier to upper camel case (notice the capitalization): `V`
  |
  = note: `#[warn(non_camel_case_types)]` (part of `#[warn(nonstandard_style)]`) on by default

error[E0740]: field must implement `Copy` or be wrapped in `ManuallyDrop<...>` to be used in a union
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-10T00-24-35/gemma-3-12b/declarations/structure_and_union_spec_1/sample_001/target.rs:9:5
  |
9 |     inner1: Inner1,
  |     ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  |
  = note: union fields must not have drop side-effects, which is currently enforced via either `Copy` or `ManuallyDrop<...>`
help: wrap the field type in `ManuallyDrop<...>`
  |
9 |     inner1: std::mem::ManuallyDrop<Inner1>,
  |             +++++++++++++++++++++++      +

error[E0277]: `Union` doesn't implement `Debug`
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-10T00-24-35/gemma-3-12b/declarations/structure_and_union_spec_1/sample_001/target.rs:3:5
  |
1 | #[derive(Debug)]
  |          ----- in this derive macro expansion
2 | struct v {
3 |     union: Union,
  |     ^^^^^^^^^^^^ the trait `Debug` is not implemented for `Union`
  |
  = note: add `#[derive(Debug)]` to `Union` or manually `impl Debug for Union`
help: consider annotating `Union` with `#[derive(Debug)]`
  |
8 + #[derive(Debug)]
9 | union Union {
  |

   |                ^^^^^
